# Don't Touch Purple

> A reflex-based browser game where you must never touch purple — tap fast, survive longer.

**Don't Touch Purple** is a free, open-source browser game built with React 18, TypeScript 5, and Vite 7. Players tap colored cells on a grid to score points while avoiding purple. The game features two modes (Classic and Evolve), 37 achievements, a dust economy, 12 GPU-accelerated animated backgrounds (OGL/WebGL), boss events (Storm, Inversion, Blackout), rare color modes, Bot Assist AI, and a global leaderboard via Firebase. It supports 5 languages, PWA install, gamepad input, and ships as a static site to Firebase Hosting.

- **Play now:** https://defaltadmin.github.io/donttouchpurple
- **Tech stack:** React 18, TypeScript 5, Vite 7, Firebase (Firestore, Analytics, Auth, App Check), GSAP, Framer Motion, dotlottie-web, OGL
- **Testing:** Vitest (162+ unit tests), Playwright (E2E)
- **Version:** 7.5.3
- **License:** MIT

## Docs

- [README](README.md): Project overview, game modes, features, tech stack, quick start
- [CLAUDE.md](CLAUDE.md): Architecture guide, common commands, key layers, game modes, special cells
- [CONTRIBUTING](CONTRIBUTING.md): How to contribute — setup, code style, PR process
- [DESIGN](DESIGN.md): Design system tokens, color palette (Dark-Cyberpunk Synthwave), CSS variables
- [CHANGELOG](CHANGELOG.md): Version history
- [SECURITY](SECURITY.md): Security policy
- [CODE_OF_CONDUCT](CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md): Community guidelines

## Architecture

The project uses a flat directory structure (no `src/` layer). Source code lives at the repo root.

- [App.tsx](App.tsx): Main screen state machine, game lifecycle orchestration (entry point)
- [main.tsx](main.tsx): React root mount, Sentry init, service worker registration
- [index.html](index.html): HTML shell with font loading, CSP, meta tags

### Engine (game logic, no React dependencies)

- [engine/GameEngine.ts](engine/GameEngine.ts): Main game loop, player state, RNG, boss events, tick scheduling
- [engine/DifficultyScaler.ts](engine/DifficultyScaler.ts): Progressive difficulty curves, grid expansion logic
- [engine/types.ts](engine/types.ts): Core type definitions — PlayerState, ActiveCell, CellType, GameState
- [engine/subsystems/TickProcessor.ts](engine/subsystems/TickProcessor.ts): Per-tick cell spawning, rare color mode activation, difficulty scaling
- [engine/subsystems/CellLifecycle.ts](engine/subsystems/CellLifecycle.ts): Click handling, special cell effects (shield, freeze, multiplier, medpack, bomb)
- [engine/subsystems/ScoreTracker.ts](engine/subsystems/ScoreTracker.ts): Score calculation, combo tracking, multiplier management
- [engine/subsystems/EventOrchestrator.ts](engine/subsystems/EventOrchestrator.ts): Boss event scheduling (Storm, Inversion, Blackout)
- [engine/subsystems/BotController.ts](engine/subsystems/BotController.ts): AI companion that taps safe cells, costs dust

### Hooks (React-Engine bridge)

- [hooks/useGameEngine.ts](hooks/useGameEngine.ts): Wraps GameEngine, provides snapshot to UI, manages game lifecycle

### Config (game balance and patterns)

- [config/gameBalance.ts](config/gameBalance.ts): Core balance constants — timing, scoring, health
- [config/difficulty.ts](config/difficulty.ts): Difficulty curve definitions per stage
- [config/gridPatterns.ts](config/gridPatterns.ts): Grid layouts and expansion patterns
- [config/powerupWeights.ts](config/powerupWeights.ts): Special cell spawn probability weights
- [config/dailyObjective.ts](config/dailyObjective.ts): Daily challenge definitions
- [config/keybindings.ts](config/keybindings.ts): Gamepad and keyboard input mapping

### Services (backend, analytics, external)

- [services/firebase.ts](services/firebase.ts): Firebase initialization, Firestore, Auth, Analytics
- [services/achievements.ts](services/achievements.ts): 37 achievement definitions and unlock logic
- [services/analytics.ts](services/analytics.ts): Event tracking, funnel metrics
- [services/sentry.ts](services/sentry.ts): Error reporting configuration
- [services/gameanalytics.ts](services/gameanalytics.ts): GameAnalytics SDK integration
- [services/audio.ts](services/audio.ts): Sound effects and music management
- [services/boss-engine.ts](services/boss-engine.ts): Boss event state machine and transitions
- [services/dda.ts](services/dda.ts): Dynamic difficulty adjustment
- [services/score-validator.ts](services/score-validator.ts): Server-side score validation

### Utils (shared utilities)

- [utils/](utils/): Error logging, asset hydration, cleanup patterns, dust animations, dev logging

### Workers (serverless)

- [workers/](workers/): Cloudflare Workers for score validation, rate limiting (see [workers/wrangler.toml](workers/wrangler.toml))

### Styles

- [styles/](styles/): CSS files, design tokens, component styles

### Types

- [types/](types/): Shared TypeScript type declarations

### Locales

- [locales/](locales/): i18n translations — English, Spanish, French, Japanese, Portuguese

### Config files

- [vite.config.ts](vite.config.ts): Vite build configuration, plugins, compression
- [tsconfig.json](tsconfig.json): TypeScript compiler options
- [firebase.json](firebase.json): Firebase Hosting and Firestore config
- [firestore.rules](firestore.rules): Firestore security rules
- [playwright.config.ts](playwright.config.ts): E2E test configuration
- [vitest.config.ts](vitest.config.ts): Unit test configuration
- [.releaserc.json](.releaserc.json): semantic-release configuration
